title: The Product Positioning Statement Playbook
snippet: Your product positioning statement decides if you stand the test of time. Learn how other expert products do it and how to write one that sticks.

title: 16 Examples of Positioning Statements & How to Craft Your Own
snippet: A positioning statement is a brief description of a product or service and an explanation of how it fulfills a particular need of the target market. The goal of a positioning statement is to align marketing efforts with a company's brand and value proposition.

title: What is product positioning? Benefits, types, and templates [2025]
snippet: Product positioning vs. market positioning vs. brand positioning These 3 types of positioning often get confused, but each serves a different purpose: Product positioning: Defines how a single product is seen in the market. Its goal is to drive adoption by highlighting unique features and benefits. Market positioning: Shapes how your entire company is perceived in the industry. It reflects ...

title: What is Product Positioning? - GeeksforGeeks
snippet: Product positioning in Product Management defines how a product is perceived by consumers. It involves analyzing the market and competitors, identifying the product's place among existing offerings, and communicating its unique value.

title: Product Positioning: Finding the Right Approach - Aha!
snippet: Product positioning is made up of core building blocks that explain your product's unique value. After you have completed your customer, market, and product assessments, you can define your product positioning, align the broader team around core messaging, and build a product marketing plan.
